subject: Use SDC 1.6.5 containers
commit_message:
Use SDC 1.6.5 containers

Change-Id: I0e1e7ee475b57179b8580b610d5b74cdecd59859
Issue-ID: SDC-2942
Signed-off-by: Ofir Sonsino <os0695@intl.att.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.
